name: Vampire's Plaything
description: When you finish a long rest, you can create one Potion of Healing or an Antitoxin if you have an empty vial or flask; these evaporate after your next long rest. You can take the Dash or Disengage action as a bonus action a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest. You also share a telepathic connection with your former vampire master while on the same plane.
